title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾为标志，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码助手的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 是一个旨在让每个人都能使用和构建 AI 的开源项目，提供工具以帮助用户专注于重要事务。

to use and to build on
provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种大型语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.6、GLM-5.1、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。

summary: OpenCode 是一个开源编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成与辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
summary: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui 是一个基于 Gradio 库的 Stable Diffusion 网页界面，提供图像生成、编辑等功能，支持多种模型和扩展。
highlights: 提供直观的网页界面，方便用户使用 Stable Diffusion 模型生成图像
支持多种模型、采样方法和扩展插件，功能丰富
开源项目，社区活跃，持续更新

title: Failing grades soar with AI usage, dwindling math skills in Berkeley CS classes
content: Article URL: https://www.dailycal.org/news/campus/academics/failing-grades-soar-as-professors-see-greater-ai-usage-dwindling-math-skills-in-uc-berkeley/article_16fad0bf-02cb-4b8c-8d88-888ffd9f8608.html Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48392004 Points: 361 # Comments: 269

highlights: Failing grades soar with AI usage, dwindling math skills in Berkeley CS classes
professors see greater AI usage, dwindling math skills

title: 32GB of DDR5 now costs $375 – AI shortage continues to squeeze PC building
content: Article URL: https://www.tomshardware.com/pc-components/ddr5/32gb-of-ddr5-now-costs-usd375-minimum-ai-shortage-continues-to-squeeze-pc-building Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48383241 Points: 403 # Comments: 360
summary: DDR5内存价格因AI芯片短缺而飙升，32GB套件现最低售价375美元，对PC组装市场造成挤压。
highlights: 32GB of DDR5 now costs $375 minimum
AI shortage continues to squeeze PC building

title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents

title: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind
content: GPT-Rosalind advances life sciences research with enhanced biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry expertise, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow capabilities.
summary: GPT-Rosalind 在生命科学研究领域取得进展，增强了生物推理、药物化学专业知识、基因组学分析和实验工作流能力。
highlights: GPT-Rosalind advances life sciences research with enhanced biological reasoning
medicinal chemistry expertise
genomics analysis
experimental workflow capabilities

title: Direct Preference Optimization Beyond Chatbots
summary: 本文探讨了直接偏好优化（DPO）在聊天机器人之外的广泛应用，包括图像生成、推荐系统、机器人控制等领域，并分析了其优势与挑战。
highlights: DPO 是一种无需强化学习的偏好优化方法，通过直接优化偏好概率来对齐模型。
文章展示了 DPO 在图像生成中提升美学质量，在推荐系统中提高用户满意度。
DPO 在机器人控制领域实现了更高效的策略学习，减少了人工干预。

title: Adding MCP Tools to Reachy Mini
summary: 本文介绍了如何为Reachy Mini机器人添加MCP（Model Context Protocol）工具，以增强其与AI模型的交互能力，包括工具定义、集成步骤和实际应用示例。
highlights: MCP tools enable Reachy Mini to perform complex tasks through standardized AI model communication.
The integration process involves defining tool schemas and implementing handlers for seamless interaction.
Practical examples demonstrate how MCP enhances robot autonomy and responsiveness.
